meaning: v.[宗]除去邪念,净心v.[医] 割包皮[阴蒂]
examples: Circumcise your hearts, therefore, and do not be stiff-necked any longer.
The ShangRing has been used to circumcise several thousand Chinese men since 2005.
59on the eighth day they came to circumcise the child, and they were going to name him after his father zechariah.
So religiously, cosmetically, and medically, there seemed to be no compelling reason for us to circumcise.
Yet to circumcise simply because that was familiar to me seemed unfair to my son.
